fixed_terms.reply: Thanks for the details on AeroSoft. I'm in generally, but 10% is low for my audience conversion — I'd need 15% commission to make the numbers work, plus a $400 fixed fee.
Happy to promote the Cloudstrides. One thing though: my standard affiliate rate is 20%, so let's set commission at 20% and I can come down to $350 on the fee.
I love the brand fit. For me to prioritize this I'd want 25% commission — that's what my other footwear partners give me — and $420 flat.
This looks great. Could we nudge the commission to 12%? Small change but it matters on volume. Fee-wise $360 works for me.
Sounds good! Quick ask — can you send two pairs of the Cloudstrides instead of one? I like to feature options on camera. Fee of $390 is fine by me.
Excited about this. For the Reel and Stories I'd want three pairs so I can show colorways — and let's land the fee at $410.
Honestly the Cloudstride isn't my style — could you send me the AeroSoft running jacket instead as the perk? I can do $380 on the fee.
I don't really do commission deals — can we swap the 10% for a flat cash bump instead? Say $450 total and no affiliate tracking.
Let's simplify: drop the commission entirely and just pay me a higher flat fee, $450. Commission tracking is a headache for me.
Love it. Along with the Cloudstrides, could you throw in one of the AeroSoft weekender bags too? Then $370 fee works great.
On the affiliate side — I'd want the 10% to apply to ALL sales during the window, not just link-attributed ones. Fee of $400 is good.
Before I sign, can you send a signing-bonus pair of shoes up front on top of the perk? Just to show good faith. I'll take $360 on the fee.
I'd commit long-term if AeroSoft put me on a lifetime-free-product list — new drops sent each season. Fee $400 for this first one.
One condition: I keep earning the 10% on my link even after the campaign ends — evergreen. If that's fine, $380 fee is fine too.
For a footwear launch I usually get 30% affiliate. Can we do that here? I'll be flexible on the fee, call it $340.
Can the reward be the shoes plus a $100 AeroSoft gift card? Rounds it out nicely. Fee of $390 and I'm in.
Instead of flat 10%, let's do a tiered commission — 10% up to 50 sales then 18% after. Fee $410 sound ok?
Not a fan of the Cloudstride — send the new AeroSoft Trailblazer model instead as my perk and I'm happy. $360 fee.
My kids would love these too — can you send a pair for each of my three kids along with mine? Then let's do $380.
I'll take the 10% but only if you guarantee a $500 minimum commission payout regardless of sales. Fee can stay at $350.
I don't need the shoes — just give me the cash equivalent of the perk added to my fee instead. Makes it $430 all in.
Let's push commission to 15% AND keep the fee at $420 — that's the version I'd get genuinely excited about promoting.
Can the perk be from the premium AeroSoft Apex line instead of the Cloudstride? Bit more prestige for my feed. $390 fee.
I'd want the 10% paid to me monthly in perpetuity on repeat customers I bring in. If you agree, $370 fee is good.
Along with my pair, send five extra pairs I can run as a giveaway to my followers. Great for engagement. Fee $400.
If I go exclusive with AeroSoft I'd expect 22% commission, not 10%. Fee stays flexible — $360 is fine.
Could the reward be a full AeroSoft apparel bundle — shoes, socks, tee, and shorts? Then $380 on the fee works.
Can you advance me the first $300 of commission up front against future sales? De-risks it for me. Fee at $350.
I'd love a fresh pair sent every quarter for a year as part of the deal, not just one. $390 fee and I'll commit today.
I want the 10% to count on in-store purchases too, not just online — I drive real foot traffic. Fee of $410 is fair.

classify.message: This sounds great, I'd love to work with AeroSoft on this!
I charge $450 for a Reel plus Stories package.
I'd do it for $380, let me know if that works.
Count me in — when do we start?
Love AeroSoft, been wearing the Cloudstrides for months. Let's do it.
My usual rate lands around $475 for this scope.
Yes! Happy to hop on a call and get this moving.
Sounds perfect, send over the agreement.
For a Reel and three Stories I'd quote $420.
Definitely interested, this is right up my alley.
I can absolutely have it live before Oct 10, I'm in.
Flat $360 and you've got a deal.
No thanks, not for me right now.
Appreciate it but this isn't a fit for my channel.
We'll pass on this one, thanks anyway.
I'm fully booked this quarter, can't take it on.
Not interested, please close this out.
This doesn't align with my content, gonna decline.
I don't do footwear brands anymore, sorry.
Going a different direction with partnerships this year, so no.
What's the budget for this?
Which platforms are you looking for — just Instagram?
How many deliverables are we talking exactly?
What are the usage rights and for how long?
When would this need to go live by?
Is there any exclusivity clause I should know about?
Can you explain how the commission part works?
Who's the brand and what's the product exactly?
Could you share the campaign brief before I decide?
Do you ship the product to me or is it a gift card?
Unsubscribe me please.
Please remove me from your list.
Stop emailing me.
Take me off this outreach, thanks.
Do not contact me again.
I want to opt out of these messages.
hmm
ok?
let me think about the thing
